title: Implement Bulkhead & Isolation Patterns
description: Partition connection pools and thread allocations to isolate failures within a system. Implement bulkhead patterns to prevent non-critical components from starving primary services. Ensure the resilience of the user-facing API layer against failures in background workers.
objectives: Partition connection pools and thread allocations to isolate failures within a system.
Implement bulkhead patterns to prevent non-critical components from starving primary services.
Ensure the resilience of the user-facing API layer against failures in background workers.
